details: The Agriculture Department of the Rajasthan government implemented the Plastic Tunnel (Lo-Tunnel) scheme, providing subsidies to farmers. A low plastic tunnel is a protected structure created by covering each crop bed with plastic sheeting at a low height after planting. It is made to protect crops from damage caused by low temperatures. This technique is very useful for off-season cultivation of vegetables in the plains of North India where the night temperature remains below 8 degrees Celsius for about 40 to 60 days during the winter season. This technique allows off-season vegetable cultivation. Vegetable seedlings are prepared using the plastic tray technique specifically in December and January.
The low tunnel can be constructed only after administrative approval is issued by the Horticulture Department.
Verification can be done by the constituted committee.
The payment of the grant amount will be transferred directly to the farmer's bank account.
benefits: 50 percent subsidy is available for a maximum of 1000 square meters.
Small/marginal category farmers are given a 75 percent subsidy for a maximum of 4000 square meters.
eligibility: The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
The applicant should be a farmer.
The applicant must have agricultural land ownership and irrigation sources.

online: Then you will be redirected to the SSO registration page. The registration page will appear with the following options.
Choose the either one option from the Jan Aadhaar Or Google to process further.
Jan Aadhaar : Enter the Jan Aadhaar number, click on the ‘Next’ button,
Select your name, the name of the head of the family and all the other members and
Click on the ‘Send OTP’ button. Enter the ‘OTP’ and
Click on the ‘Verify OTP’ button to Complete the registration.
Google : Enter the Gmail ID, click on the ‘Next’ button,
A new link appear on screen, now click on new SSO link.
SSO id will appear on screen, now create the password.
Enter Mobile number, click on registration.

documents_required: Copy of Jamabandi (not more than six months old)

faqs.question: What is the objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The main objective of Plastic Tunnel (Lo-Tunnel) is to grow vegetable crops by protecting them from major biotic or abiotic factors. In this, the crop can be grown by protecting it from any one factor or many factors.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to benefit from the scheme?
faqs.answer: Farmers are eligible for the scheme.

faqs.question: May Other State persons also apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, this scheme is only for Rajasthan.

faqs.question: What is the purpose of installing plastic tunnels?
faqs.answer: Plastic tunnels create a controlled environment for crops, protecting them from adverse weather conditions such as wind, rain, and extreme temperatures. They also help to extend the growing season and improve crop quality and yield.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of using plastic tunnels in agriculture?
faqs.answer: Plastic tunnels provide a cost-effective means of protected cultivation, allowing farmers to grow a wider variety of crops throughout the year. They also help to conserve water, reduce pest and disease pressure, and improve crop productivity and quality.

faqs.question: How do a applicant know if a field in the application form is mandatory?
faqs.answer: A distinctive sign (“*” symbol, “mandatory” mention, etc.)

faqs.question: What is DBT?
faqs.answer: Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) was launched by the Government of India in January 2013. Here the money will be directly transferred to the bank account of the beneficiaries of various Government schemes.

faqs.question: Can applicant fill the application form in a language other than English?
faqs.answer: No, applicants can fill only in the English language.

faqs.question: How can applicant apply online?
faqs.answer: One can apply by visiting the e-Mitra centre. https://sso.rajasthan.gov.in/register

faqs.question: What documents are required ?
faqs.answer: Aadhar Card / Janadhar Card Copy of Jamabandi (not more than six months old) Quotation from approved firm
